items.headline: U.S. manufacturers see best month in 2 1/2 years, but Iran war threatens to derail progress
items.summary: American manufacturing grew in March at the fastest pace since mid-2022 by one measure, but the conflict with Iran added a new level of uncertainty just as the effects of the Trump tariffs were fading.
